description:
Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages test, image_build_version, image_test_version, and image_update_latest. Add a test stage job named alpine_test_all using the alpine:latest image that runs: apk add --update bash curl git; mkdir ~/.ssh; printf "Host *
 StrictHostKeyChecking no" > ~/.ssh/config; which bash; which busybox; bash --version; bash test/test_all_exit_status.sh; bash test/test_install.sh; bash test/test_core.sh; bash test/test_function.sh; bash test/test_yaml.sh. Add a test stage job arch_test_all using archlinux:20191205 that runs: pacman -Sy --noconfirm diffutils glibc git which; mkdir ~/.ssh; printf "Host *
 StrictHostKeyChecking no" > ~/.ssh/config; which bash; bash --version; bash test/test_all_exit_status.sh; bash test/test_install.sh; bash test/test_core.sh; bash test/test_function.sh; bash test/test_yaml.sh. Add bash32_base_tests (bash:3.2), bash40_base_tests (bash:4.0) and bash50_base_tests (bash:5.0) jobs in the test stage each running: which bash; bash --version; bash test/test_install.sh; bash test/test_core.sh; bash test/test_function.sh; bash test/test_yaml.sh. Add centos_test_all using centos:latest that runs: yum -y update; yum -y install curl git which; mkdir ~/.ssh; printf "Host *
 StrictHostKeyChecking no" > ~/.ssh/config; which bash; bash --version; bash test/test_all_exit_status.sh; bash test/test_install.sh; bash test/test_core.sh; bash test/test_function.sh; bash test/test_yaml.sh. Add debianjessie_curl_test_all, debianjessie_test_all, debianjessie_wget_test_all and debianlatest_test_all jobs using appropriate Debian images that run apt-get update -qq; apt-get install -y -qq <packages>; mkdir ~/.ssh; printf "Host *
 StrictHostKeyChecking no" > ~/.ssh/config; which bash; bash test/test_all_exit_status.sh (where applicable); bash test/test_install.sh; bash test/test_core.sh; bash test/test_function.sh; bash test/test_yaml.sh. Add an image_build job in stage image_build_version that runs only on tags, uses docker:git image with docker:dind service and executes: IMAGE_VERSION=$(grep "\_VERSION\=" space | cut -d'=' -f2 | cut -d""" -f2); docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY; docker build --build-arg VERSION=$IMAGE_VERSION -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_VERSION -f ./build/Dockerfile .; docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_VERSION. Add an image_release job in stage image_update_latest that runs only on tags, uses docker:git with docker:dind and runs: IMAGE_VERSION=$(grep "\_VERSION\=" space | cut -d'=' -f2 | cut -d""" -f2); docker pull $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_VERSION; docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY; docker tag $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_VERSION $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest; docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest. Finally add an image_test job in stage image_test_version that runs only on tags, uses docker:git with docker:dind and runs: IMAGE_VERSION=$(grep "\_VERSION\=" space | cut -d'=' -f2 | cut -d""" -f2); docker pull $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$IMAGE_VERSION; sh test/test_build.sh.
